verses.latin_vulgate: David vero hos habuit filios, qui ei nati sunt in Hebron : primogenitum Amnon ex Achinoam Jezrahelitide, secundum Daniel de Abigail Carmelitide,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֤לֶּה הָיוּ֙ בְּנֵ֣י דָוִ֔יד אֲשֶׁ֥ר נוֹלַד־ל֖וֹ בְּחֶבְר֑וֹן הַבְּכ֣וֹר ׀ אַמְנֹ֗ן לַאֲחִינֹ֙עַם֙ הַיִּזְרְעֵאלִ֔ית שֵׁנִי֙ דָּנִיֵּ֔אל לַאֲבִיגַ֖יִל הַֽכַּרְמְלִֽית׃
verses.king_james: Now these were the sons of David, which were born unto him in Hebron; the firstborn Amnon, of Ahinoam the Jezreelitess; the second Daniel, of Abigail the Carmelitess:

verses.latin_vulgate: tertium Absalom filium Maacha filiæ Tholmai regis Gessur, quartum Adoniam filium Aggith,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשְּׁלִשִׁי֙ לְאַבְשָׁל֣וֹם בֶּֽן־מַעֲכָ֔ה בַּת־תַּלְמַ֖י מֶ֣לֶךְ גְּשׁ֑וּר הָרְבִיעִ֖י אֲדֹנִיָּ֥ה בֶן־חַגִּֽית׃
verses.king_james: The third, Absalom the son of Maachah the daughter of Talmai king of Geshur: the fourth, Adonijah the son of Haggith:

verses.latin_vulgate: quintum Saphathiam ex Abital, sextum Jethraham de Egla uxore sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַחֲמִישִׁ֥י שְׁפַטְיָ֖ה לַאֲבִיטָ֑ל הַשִּׁשִּׁ֥י יִתְרְעָ֖ם לְעֶגְלָ֥ה אִשְׁתּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: The fifth, Shephatiah of Abital: the sixth, Ithream by Eglah his wife.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sex ergo nati sunt ei in Hebron, ubi regnavit septem annis et sex mensibus. Triginta autem et tribus annis regnavit in Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁשָּׁה֙ נוֹלַד־ל֣וֹ בְחֶבְר֔וֹן וַיִּ֨מְלׇךְ־שָׁ֔ם שֶׁ֥בַע שָׁנִ֖ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֣ה חֳדָשִׁ֑ים וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֤ים וְשָׁלוֹשׁ֙ שָׁנָ֔ה מָלַ֖ךְ בִּירוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: These six were born unto him in Hebron; and there he reigned seven years and six months: and in Jerusalem he reigned thirty and three years.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro in Jerusalem nati sunt ei filii, Simmaa, et Sobab, et Nathan, et Salomon, quatuor de Bethsabee filia Ammiel :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֥לֶּה נוּלְּדוּ־ל֖וֹ בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑יִם שִׁ֠מְעָ֠א וְשׁוֹבָ֞ב וְנָתָ֤ן וּשְׁלֹמֹה֙ אַרְבָּעָ֔ה לְבַת־שׁ֖וּעַ בַּת־עַמִּיאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: And these were born unto him in Jerusalem; Shimea, and Shobab, and Nathan, and Solomon, four, of Bath–shua the daughter of Ammiel:

verses.latin_vulgate: Jebaar quoque et Elisama,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיִבְחָ֥ר וֶאֱלִישָׁמָ֖ע וֶאֱלִיפָֽלֶט׃
verses.king_james: Ibhar also, and Elishama, and Eliphelet,

verses.latin_vulgate: et Eliphaleth, et Noge, et Nepheg, et Japhia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנֹ֥גַהּ וְנֶ֖פֶג וְיָפִֽיעַ׃
verses.king_james: And Nogah, and Nepheg, and Japhia,

verses.latin_vulgate: necnon Elisama, et Eliada, et Elipheleth, novem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וֶאֱלִישָׁמָ֧ע וְאֶלְיָדָ֛ע וֶאֱלִיפֶ֖לֶט תִּשְׁעָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And Elishama, and Eliada, and Eliphelet, nine.

verses.latin_vulgate: omnes hi, filii David absque filiis concubinarum : habueruntque sororem Thamar.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֖ל בְּנֵ֣י דָוִ֑יד מִלְּבַ֥ד בְּֽנֵי־פִֽילַגְשִׁ֖ים וְתָמָ֥ר אֲחוֹתָֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: These were all the sons of David, beside the sons of the concubines, and Tamar their sister.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius autem Salomonis, Roboam : cujus Abia filius genuit Asa. De hoc quoque natus est Josaphat,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֶן־שְׁלֹמֹ֖ה רְחַבְעָ֑ם אֲבִיָּ֥ה בְנ֛וֹ אָסָ֥א בְנ֖וֹ יְהוֹשָׁפָ֥ט בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And Solomon’s son was Rehoboam, Abia his son, Asa his son, Jehoshaphat his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: pater Joram : qui Joram genuit Ochoziam, ex quo ortus est Joas :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹרָ֥ם בְּנ֛וֹ אֲחַזְיָ֥הוּ בְנ֖וֹ יוֹאָ֥שׁ בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Joram his son, Ahaziah his son, Joash his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: et hujus Amasias filius genuit Azariam. Porro Azariæ filius Joatham
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲמַצְיָ֧הוּ בְנ֛וֹ עֲזַרְיָ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ יוֹתָ֥ם בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Amaziah his son, Azariah his son, Jotham his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: procreavit Achaz patrem Ezechiæ, de quo natus est Manasses.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָחָ֥ז בְּנ֛וֹ חִזְקִיָּ֥הוּ בְנ֖וֹ מְנַשֶּׁ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Ahaz his son, Hezekiah his son, Manasseh his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et Manasses genuit Amon patrem Josiæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָמ֥וֹן בְּנ֖וֹ יֹאשִׁיָּ֥הוּ בְנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Amon his son, Josiah his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii autem Josiæ fuerunt : primogenitus Johanan, secundus Joakim, tertius Sedecias, quartus Sellum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵי֙ יֹֽאשִׁיָּ֔הוּ הַבְּכוֹר֙ יֽוֹחָנָ֔ן הַשֵּׁנִ֖י יְהוֹיָקִ֑ים הַשְּׁלִשִׁי֙ צִדְקִיָּ֔הוּ הָרְבִיעִ֖י שַׁלּֽוּם׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Josiah were, the firstborn Johanan, the second Jehoiakim, the third Zedekiah, the fourth Shallum.

verses.latin_vulgate: De Joakim natus est Jechonias, et Sedecias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֖י יְהוֹיָקִ֑ים יְכׇנְיָ֥ה בְנ֖וֹ צִדְקִיָּ֥ה בְנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Jehoiakim: Jeconiah his son, Zedekiah his son.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Jechoniæ fuerunt : Asir, Salathiel,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵי֙ יְכׇנְיָ֣ה אַסִּ֔ר שְׁאַלְתִּיאֵ֖ל בְּנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Jeconiah; Assir, Salathiel his son,

verses.latin_vulgate: Melchiram, Phadaia, Senneser, et Jecemia, Sama, et Nadabia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַלְכִירָ֥ם וּפְדָיָ֖ה וְשֶׁנְאַצַּ֑ר יְקַמְיָ֥ה הוֹשָׁמָ֖ע וּנְדַבְיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Malchiram also, and Pedaiah, and Shenazar, Jecamiah, Hoshama, and Nedabiah.

verses.latin_vulgate: De Phadaia orti sunt Zorobabel et Semei. Zorobabel genuit Mosollam, Hananiam, et Salomith sororem eorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י פְדָיָ֔ה זְרֻבָּבֶ֖ל וְשִׁמְעִ֑י וּבֶן־זְרֻבָּבֶל֙ מְשֻׁלָּ֣ם וַחֲנַנְיָ֔ה וּשְׁלֹמִ֖ית אֲחוֹתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Pedaiah were, Zerubbabel, and Shimei: and the sons of Zerubbabel; Meshullam, and Hananiah, and Shelomith their sister:

verses.latin_vulgate: Hasaban quoque, et Ohol, et Barachian, et Hasadian, Josabhesed, quinque.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַחֲשֻׁבָ֡ה וָ֠אֹ֠הֶל וּבֶרֶכְיָ֧ה וַחֲסַדְיָ֛ה י֥וּשַׁב חֶ֖סֶד חָמֵֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: And Hashubah, and Ohel, and Berechiah, and Hasadiah, Jushab–hesed, five.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius autem Hananiæ, Phaltias pater Jeseiæ, cujus filius Raphaia : hujus quoque filius, Arnan, de quo natus est Obdia, cujus filius fuit Sechenias.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֶן־חֲנַנְיָ֖ה פְּלַטְיָ֣ה וִישַֽׁעְיָ֑ה בְּנֵ֤י רְפָיָה֙ בְּנֵ֣י אַרְנָ֔ן בְּנֵ֥י עֹבַדְיָ֖ה בְּנֵ֥י שְׁכַנְיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Hananiah; Pelatiah, and Jesaiah: the sons of Rephaiah, the sons of Arnan, the sons of Obadiah, the sons of Shechaniah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius Secheniæ, Semeia : cujus filii Hattus, et Jegaal, et Baria, et Naaria, et Saphat, sex numero.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֥י שְׁכַנְיָ֖ה שְׁמַֽעְיָ֑ה וּבְנֵ֣י שְׁמַֽעְיָ֗ה חַטּ֡וּשׁ וְ֠יִגְאָ֠ל וּבָרִ֧יחַ וּנְעַרְיָ֛ה וְשָׁפָ֖ט שִׁשָּֽׁה׃
verses.king_james: And the sons of Shechaniah; Shemaiah: and the sons of Shemaiah; Hattush, and Igeal, and Bariah, and Neariah, and Shaphat, six.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filius Naariæ, Elioënai, et Ezechias, et Ezricam, tres.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבֶן־נְעַרְיָ֗ה אֶלְיוֹעֵינַ֧י וְחִזְקִיָּ֛ה וְעַזְרִיקָ֖ם שְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And the sons of Neariah; Elioenai, and Hezekiah, and Azrikam, three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Elioënai, Oduia, et Eliasub, et Pheleia, et Accub, et Johanan, et Dalaia, et Anani, septem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י אֶלְיוֹעֵינַ֗י (הודיוהו) [הוֹדַוְיָ֡הוּ] וְאֶלְיָשִׁ֡יב וּפְלָיָ֡ה וְ֠עַקּ֠וּב וְיוֹחָנָ֧ן וּדְלָיָ֛ה וַעֲנָ֖נִי שִׁבְעָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And the sons of Elioenai were, Hodaiah, and Eliashib, and Pelaiah, and Akkub, and Johanan, and Dalaiah, and Anani, seven.
